docs.title: DuReader-OpenAI
docs.text:
This project evaluates OpenAI-compatible chat models on the 200-example DuReader Chinese question answering benchmark slice in data/dureader.jsonl.

main.py mirrors the evaluation flow from ../2WikiMultihopQA-OpenAI/:

  • load the dataset
  • format prompts from prompt/template.txt
  • call the OpenAI-compatible chat API in async batches
  • compute F1, Precision, Recall, and ROUGE-L
  • save detailed results to both CSV (for data analysis) and Markdown (for GitHub display)

docs.title: Run
docs.text:
uv sync
uv run python main.py

For a no-API sanity check:

uv run python main.py --debug-mode --max-samples 5

Run with custom model:

uv run python main.py \
  --model-name my-model \
  --save-results-path results/dureader/my-model.csv

docs.title: Output
docs.text:
• results/dureader/*.csv - raw CSV with all metrics for data processing
  • results/dureader/*.md - Markdown table that renders nicely on GitHub with wrapped lines

Generate Markdown from an existing CSV:

./generate_md_from_csv.py results/dureader/model.csv

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• data/dureader.jsonl is used directly as ground truth with no fixing or filtering.
  • Each sample may contain multiple acceptable answers. Evaluation scores a model response against all of them and keeps the best score.
  • The prompt template is externalized in prompt/template.txt so you can adjust wording without changing the evaluator.
  • Chinese text uses character-by-character tokenization for proper F1/ROUGE calculation regardless of spacing.

docs.title: Dataset
docs.text: The evaluation uses a fixed 200-sample slice of the DuReader dataset stored at data/dureader.jsonl.

docs.title: Format
docs.text:
Each line is a JSON object with:

{
  "context": "Full passage context from Wikipedia/search results...",
  "input": "The question to answer",
  "answers": [
    "First acceptable answer",
    "Second acceptable answer",
    "..."
  ]
}
  • context: The source text the model must base its answer on
  • input: The question
  • answers: One or more gold-standard acceptable answers (multiple answers are allowed because questions can have multiple valid phrasings)

docs.title: Sample Entry
docs.text:
Here's a concrete example:

{
  "input": "热诚传说结局",
  "answers": ["《热诚传说》动画的结局是百合。"],
  "context": "文章:文章1\n标题：对结局好失望_热诚传说x吧_百度贴吧\n..."
}

docs.title: Statistics
docs.text:
• Total samples: 200
  • Average context length: ~several thousand characters per sample
  • Multiple answers per question: Yes, some questions have multiple valid phrasings
  • Language: All questions and context are Chinese

docs.title: Evaluation Strategy
docs.text:
When multiple gold answers are available, the evaluation: 1. Computes metrics against every gold answer independently 2. Keeps the best (highest F1) score for the prediction

This accounts for the fact that any of the listed answers can be correct.

docs.title: Prompt Template
docs.text: The project uses an externalized prompt template that lives at prompt/template.txt.

docs.title: Current Template
docs.text: text title="prompt/template.txt" 请基于给定的文章回答下述问题。 文章:{context} 请基于上述文章回答下面的问题。 问题:{input} 请简短回答。 回答:

docs.title: Template Variables
docs.text:
The template is formatted with two variables:

  • {context} - The supporting document context from the dataset
  • {input} - The user question to answer based on the context

docs.title: Why This Format
docs.text:
The template is:

  • Simple: Direct instruction to answer the question based on the provided article
  • Chinese-native: Written in natural Chinese for Chinese models
  • Minimal: No unnecessary instructions that would increase prompt length

docs.title: Customization
docs.text: You can modify prompt/template.txt to change the prompting strategy without modifying any evaluation code. All evaluations will automatically use your updated template.

docs.title: Results: doubao-seed-2.0-pro
docs.text:
This page shows the full evaluation results for doubao-seed-2.0-pro on the 200-sample DuReader evaluation set.

The full markdown with all samples is also available in the repository at: results/dureader/doubao-seed-2.0-pro.md

docs.title: First Sample
docs.text: Index Question Gold Answers Model Response F1 Precision Recall ROUGE-L 1 热诚传说结局 - 《热诚传说》动画的结局是百合。 关于动画版《热诚传说X》的结局：史雷（男主）沉睡醒来已是多年后，公主等旧人已逝，官方最终盖章了百合感情线，不少观众对此结局感到失望。游戏版若触发隐藏结局，条件是通关4神殿、德泽尔在队时打死显主，且途中在大劣势下击败遇到的狮子。 0.2143 0.1200 1.0000 0.1786

docs.title: Summary
docs.text:
Metric Average F1 0.3646 Precision 0.3446 Recall 0.5407 ROUGE-L 0.2641
  • Number of samples: 200
  • Evaluation date: 2026-04-13

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• This is the raw evaluation with no filtering
  • All 200 samples from data/dureader.jsonl are included
  • Chinese character tokenization fix applied (F1 scores are accurate)
